cenas.dalle_prompt: A fun, fast-paced montage of a dog performing all of this week's tricks: Pata, Gira, Rola, Reverência, Morto, and Vergonha. Upbeat, playful music. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Quick cuts, with the name of each trick appearing as a fun, animated text overlay. The whole sequence feels like a talent show.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A checklist infographic for Week 6, showing all six tricks with a star next to each one. 8k detail.
cenas.grok_movement: Each star animates in with a magical sparkle sound, confirming the completion of each fun trick.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A short performance routine: the owner gives a sequence of cues, and the dog performs Gira -> Reverência -> Morto -> Vergonha. A perfect showcase of the week's learning. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A continuous shot that captures the entire performance, showing the dog's intelligence and the strong bond with its owner.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Close-up on a calendar showing Week 6 being circled with a jester hat sticker, symbolizing the fun and playful nature of the week. 8k detail.
cenas.grok_movement: The circle and jester hat sticker animate onto the calendar with a fun, bouncy effect.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final screen with text 'Semana 6 Concluída! O Show de Talentos Começou!', with a preview of next week's topic 'Próxima Semana: Habilidades de Utilidade', building anticipation. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A graphic of a stage with spotlights appears. The preview for the next week slides in with a practical, tool-like transition.
